mechanics.base_effect: Target cannot regain hit points via any source (Natural or Magical).
mechanics.degradation: Every 24 hours, Max HP decreases by 10 (3d6). Target dies if Max HP reaches 0.
mechanics.removal_path: Remove Curse (3rd Level) followed by Greater Restoration or Healing.

mechanics.base_effect: Alignment shift to Malicious (except Werebear). Gain Damage Immunities (Non-magical Physical).
mechanics.degradation: Forced transformation during Full Moon. PC loses control to DM/AI-Routine.
mechanics.removal_path: Remove Curse (Only if administered before the first Full Moon transformation).

mechanics.trigger: Taking damage while weapon is equipped
mechanics.base_effect: Berserk State: Must use Action to attack nearest creature (Ally or Enemy).
mechanics.degradation: Weapon cannot be unequipped or discarded while cursed.
mechanics.removal_path: Banishment or Remove Curse cast on the wielder to allow item decoupling.

mechanics.trigger: Hag occupies Ethereal Plane within 30ft of sleeping target
mechanics.base_effect: Long Rest provides no benefit. No HP or Spell Slot recovery.
mechanics.degradation: Max HP reduced by 1d10 every night. Death at 0 Max HP.
mechanics.removal_path: Protection from Evil and Good or Dispel Evil and Good.

mechanics.base_effect: Resurrection spells (Revivify, Raise Dead, etc.) automatically fail.
mechanics.degradation: Previously resurrected beings lose 1 Max HP per day.
mechanics.removal_path: Destruction of the source artifact (Campaign Milestone).

mechanics.base_effect: Skin becomes translucent and slimy. Can only breathe underwater.
mechanics.degradation: Takes 1d12 Acid damage every 10 mins if skin is not doused in fresh water.
mechanics.removal_path: Heal or any disease-curing magic cast within 1 minute; otherwise, Remove Curse.

mechanics.trigger: Finishing a Long Rest in the Shadowfell
mechanics.base_effect: Roll on Despair Table (Apathy, Dread, or Madness).
mechanics.degradation: Disadvantage on all Saving Throws and Initiative.
mechanics.removal_path: Finishing a Long Rest in a 'bright' plane or Greater Restoration.

mechanics.trigger: Starting turn within 30ft of creature and making eye contact
mechanics.degradation: Petrified condition (Second Failure). Target becomes Stone.
mechanics.removal_path: Greater Restoration or Flesh to Stone (Reversed).

mechanics.saving_throw: WIS vs Caster Spell Save DC
mechanics.base_effect: Choose: Disadvantage on 1 Ability Score, Extra Necrotic Damage, or Turn Loss.
mechanics.degradation: Concentration-based (1 minute) or Permanent if cast at 9th level.
